mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TT1.NTC_NO, TT1.NTC_TTL, TT1.NTC_CN, TT1.NTC_REG, TT1.NTC_REG_HM, TT1.NTC_MOD, TT1.NTC_MOD_HM, TT1.REG_NO, TT1.MOD_NO, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TT1.NTC_NO DESC) AS rnum, COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count FROM NOTICE TT1 WHERE 1=1
AND NTC_TTL LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND NTC_CN LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND (NTC_TTL LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%' OR NTC_CN LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%')
ORDER BY NTC_NO ASC ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM <= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + #{pageSize} ) TT1 WHERE rnum >= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (NTC_NO, NTC_TTL, NTC_CN, NTC_REG, NTC_REG_HM, NTC_MOD, NTC_MOD_HM, REG_NO, MOD_NO) VALUES (SEQ_NTC_NO.NEXTVAL, #{ntcTtl}, #{ntcCn}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), #{regNo}, #{modNo})
mapper.select: SELECT NTC_NO, NTC_TTL, NTC_CN, NTC_REG, NTC_REG_HM, NTC_MOD, NTC_MOD_HM, REG_NO, MOD_NO FROM NOTICE WHERE NTC_NO = #{ntcNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET NTC_TTL = #{ntcTtl}, NTC_CN = #{ntcCn}, NTC_MOD = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), NTC_MOD_HM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), MOD_NO = #{modNo} WHERE NTC_NO = #{ntcNo}
